action_set_definitions.name: get_session_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a comprehensive list of all tracks, buses, and the Master Bus, including their current names, activity status (muted/active), and fader positions.

action_set_definitions.name: get_signal_routing
action_set_definitions.description: Identifies the output destination of a specific entity and lists all unique IDs of tracks or buses currently routed into it.

entity_id.description: The unique ID of the track or bus to query.

action_set_definitions.name: get_plugin_architecture
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes the plugin chain of a specified bus to categorize it as either 'analog-modeled' or 'linear digital'.

bus_id.description: The unique ID of the bus to analyze.

action_set_definitions.name: get_metering_data
action_set_definitions.description: Captures precise RMS, Peak, and True Peak measurements for a specific track or bus.

entity_id.description: The unique ID of the track or bus to measure.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_track_gain
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the input gain (pre-fader) for a source track. This does not modify the fader position.

track_id.description: The unique ID of the source track.

gain_change_db.description: The amount of gain in dB to add (positive) or subtract (negative).

state_description.tracks: A list of objects representing individual audio tracks and their current parameters.
state_description.master_bus: The state of the master output channel, including volume and master effects.
state_description.transport: The playback state of the session.
state_description.solo_bus: List of track IDs currently in 'Solo' mode.
